title: Starly Horizons
description: Starly Horizons is a modpack with RPG elements and immersive exploration, powered by Distant Horizons. It was originally created as a personal project for a private server, but it is fully available and open for anyone who wants to use it.
body:
**Starly Horizons** is a modpack with RPG elements and immersive exploration, powered by Distant Horizons. It was originally created as a personal project for a private server, but it is fully available and open for anyone who wants to use it.

## 🛠️ Features

This modpack includes popular mods to enhance the feel of a true RPG adventure:

- **Class-Based RPG Series** – Unique armors and weapons to fit your class and style.
 
- **BetterCombat** – A smoother, less repetitive combat system.

- **Distant Horizons** – Relax and enjoy the distant views without breaking immersion.

- **Origins: Medieval & Aspects** – New origins and passive abilities to customize your playstyle.

- **Performance Mods** – Includes Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and other well-known optimization tools.

- **A Sound Overhaul** – Immersive ambient sounds and improved audio atmosphere.

For the best visual experience, I recommend using Photon-GAMS shaders.
You can download them from the following link:
🔗 [Photon-GAMS](https://github.com/OUdefie17/Photon-GAMS)

**All rights reserved to the original authors.**
